<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:宝萊山古墳]]
{{Infobox ancient site|image=File:Horaisan Kofun (Ota), funkyu.jpg|location={{ill|Den'en Chōfu|qid=Q2613265|1=Den-en-chōfu}}|coordinates={{Coord|35.593153|N|139.663358|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}|architectural_styles={{ill|keyhole-shaped kofun|qid=Q11268718|1=Zenpōkōenfun|2=ja|3=前方後円墳|4=ko|5=전방후원분|6=zh|7=前方後圓墳}}|part_of={{ill|Ebaradai kofun-gun|qid=Q11618305|1=Ebaradai kofun-gun}}}}

{{translated page|ja|宝萊山古墳|version=99994994|comment=Imported full ja history}}

[[ja:宝萊山古墳]]

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
{{Commons category|Horaisan Kofun (Ota)}}
{{wikidata link|Q11452676}}
[[Category:Den-en-chōfu]]
[[Category:Designated historic sites of Tokyo]]
[[Category:History of Ota, Tokyo]]
[[Category:Kofun of Tokyo]]
[[Category:Wikidata no short description]]
[[Category:Zenpokoenfun]]
